author: Daniel
description: Create and persist Duolingo inspired habit streaks from daily-note frontmatter with widgets, colours, and customisable streak types. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Daniel Khansa
manifest.description: Create and persist Duolingo inspired habit streaks from daily-note frontmatter with widgets, colours, and customisable streak types.
manifest.name: Property Streak

name: Property Streak

releases.author: Git-Hub-Dangel
releases.description:
Initial Release (for the Obsidian Plugin Marketplace)

Features introduced with the version:
- Mobile support
- Partial flame for multi streaks

Bugfixes:
- Partial flame persistence in the widget on window focus change
releases.name: Initial Release (for Obsidian Plugin Marketplace)
